appliedUpdates.description: Added PyTorch single-element std() gotcha to architecture.md: use unbiased=False or check numel() > 1 before calling std() on tensors that may have a single element.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Coding Conventions: '__init__.py files should export all public classes and functions from the module with an __all__ list. Docstrings should describe the module purpose and key components.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reinforcepp-alignment worker discovered that the existing __init__.py only had a one-line docstring and needed to be replaced with full exports. This pattern is consistent across modules but not documented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Testing Guidance step 1 to include 'ruff check --fix' before final verification, so workers auto-fix import sorting (I001) issues during development rather than discovering them at the end.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reinforcepp-alignment worker had 5 import sorting issues (I001) that needed auto-fixing after initial code creation. This is a recurring pattern seen across multiple features.
